REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCENEAUX JR, STEVE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DECLARATION OF ADDRESS CHANGE (MAILING ADDRESS) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SPORTS BASEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VINCENT MCCOY WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SPORTS BASEMENT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOYCE CHAN, HR MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2017 - JUDGMENT.
